'''Malik Technologies''' was a manufacturer of protective and environmental suits. The [[A-5 envirosuit]] was their most popular environmental suit on [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
